summary: Reposted Newsmax interview segment. Two anchors sit at a studio desk against a New York skyline backdrop at left and center, with a remote guest, a man in a suit and glasses, at right. A lower-third reads 'FRAUD FEARS / APPROVALS FOR GREEN CARDS DROP UNDER TRUMP,' with a 'LIVE' tag and a news ticker. The audio is the guest describing vetting of green-card and citizenship applicants.

script.scene: Newsmax studio with two anchors at a desk and a remote guest in glasses at right; chyron 'FRAUD FEARS / APPROVALS FOR GREEN CARDS DROP UNDER TRUMP.'
